value.title: AMD (AMD) Acquires MEXT To Tackle AI Memory Bottlenecks In Data Centers
value.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (NasdaqGS:AMD) has agreed to acquire MEXT, a company focused on AI driven memory optimization. The deal is aimed at addressing AI memory bottlenecks in data centers by integrating predictive memory technology into AMD’s platform. This move is positioned to broaden AMD’s data center capabilities and support enterprise AI infrastructure customers. For investors watching AMD’s push into data center and enterprise AI, the MEXT acquisition focuses on one of the less talked...

value.title: What Qualcomm Stock Was Saying About Its Multibillion-Dollar Data Center Plan
value.summary: Before the stock surged, management was methodically laying out a future beyond handsets, but you had to be listening for a different kind of story.

value.title: Broadcom Built OpenAI’s First Chip in Record Time, but the Money Went Elsewhere
value.summary: The Broadcom OpenAI partnership just shipped the Jalapeño chip, yet money is rotating to two other names even as analysts stay bullish.
